name: VictoriaMetrics
description: Time-series metrics backend. Receives workload metrics from the platform via gRPC and stores them in VictoriaMetrics.
longDescription:
Deploys a gRPC wrapper alongside a VictoriaMetrics container. The platform forwards workload metric samples via IngestMetrics gRPC calls; the wrapper writes them to VictoriaMetrics using the Prometheus import API.

Exposes a PromQL-compatible query endpoint at http://victoriametrics:8428 for Grafana and other visualizers.
author: Kleff

config.label: VictoriaMetrics URL
config.description: Override to use an external VictoriaMetrics instance. Leave blank to use the bundled companion.
